name: PLNALTSTOK1
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[PLNALTSTOK1] AS 
SELECT AMBAR_KODU,STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF,MIN(STOK3) AS STOK FROM (
SELECT 
      SH.STOK_REF,
	  SH.VARYANT_REF,
      SH.MIKTAR,
      SH.AMBAR_KODU,
      SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR,
      (SELECT CONVERT(FLOAT,CONVERT(NUMERIC(24,8),SUM(MIKTAR))) FROM AMBARTAKIP WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF AND VARYANT_REF=SH.VARYANT_REF  AND AMBAR_KODU=SH.AMBAR_KODU) AS STOK1 ,
      S.ALT_BIRIM_ADEDI AS ABA,
      SA.STOKSUB_REF,
      ALT_MIKTAR=((SA.MIKTAR /SB.CARPAN1) * SB.CARPAN2),
      (SELECT CONVERT(FLOAT,CONVERT(NUMERIC(24,8),SUM(MIKTAR))) FROM AMBARTAKIP WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STOK_REF=SA.STOKSUB_REF AND VARYANT_REF=SA.VARYANT_REF AND AMBAR_KODU=SH.AMBAR_KODU) AS STOK2,
      FLOOR( ISNULL( (SELECT CONVERT(FLOAT,CONVERT(NUMERIC(24,8),SUM(MIKTAR))) FROM AMBARTAKIP WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STOK_REF=SA.STOKSUB_REF AND VARYANT_REF=SA.VARYANT_REF AND AMBAR_KODU=SH.AMBAR_KODU)  ,0)
      - ISNULL((SELECT SUM(SA_APM) FROM PLNALTSTOKAP WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STOK_REF=SA.STOKSUB_REF AND VARYANT_REF=SA.VARYANT_REF  AND AMBAR_KODU=SH.AMBAR_KODU),0)) / ((SA.MIKTAR /SB.CARPAN1) * SB.CARPAN2)
      AS STOK3
FROM 
      SIPARISHAREKETLERI SH WITH(NOLOCK),
      STOKALT SA WITH(NOLOCK),
      STOKBIRIM SB WITH(NOLOCK),
      STOKKARTI S WITH(NOLOCK)
WHERE 
      SIPARIS_TURU=1 
      AND KAPALI=0 
      AND CSUB=1
      AND SH.MIKTAR - SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR >0
      AND SA.STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF
	  AND SA.VARYANT_REF =SH.VARYANT_REF
      AND SB.BIRIM_REF=SA.BIRIM_REF
      AND S.STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF
      ) AS LIST 
      GROUP BY 
      AMBAR_KODU,STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF
